alkylation reagent: 10.0 µL of 1.0 M iodine acetamide was pipetted to each sample
alkylation concentration: 10.0 µL of 1.0 M iodine acetamide was pipetted to each sample
cleavage agent: 1.0 µg trypsin was added into each sample
enrichment method: High-abundance proteins were removed using the Proteominer Protein Enrichment Kit
fractionation method: Peptides fractionation assay was performed using the Ultra-Performance Liquid Chromatography (UPLC) 3000 system
fragmentation method: Higher Energy Collision Dissociation (HCD) fragmentation mode
instrument: using the Q Exactive mass spectrometry (ThermoFisher Scientific, USA)
labeling: TMT 10-plex™ Label Reagent (ThermoFisher Scientific, USA) was used to label the plasma-derived peptides
